actions.name: UPDATE ACCOUNT.CONSENT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACCOUNT.CONSENT.UPDATE.b`. Program Description This section initialises Arrangement Activity related information
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS MATCHES "UNAUTH":@VM:"UNAUTH-CHG" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS MATCHES 'AUTH':@VM:"AUTH-REV" 3. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: IF accConsentType THEN 4. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next condition change. 5. `PROCESS.AUTHORISE.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "AUTH" | GOSUB UPDATE.CONSENT.XREF ; *Update Consent XREF file | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "AUTH-REV" | UpdateType = 'DELETE' | GOSUB UPDATE.CONSENT.XREF ; *Update Consent XREF file
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: DEBIT ACCOUNT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACCOUNT.DEBIT.b`. Program Description Action to debit an arrangement account
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()[AA.Framework.Sep,1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | ACTIVITY.AMOUNT = "" | ACTIVITY.NAME = AF.Framework.getActivityId()<AA.Framework.ActActivity> | BALANCE.PROPERTY = '' 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: CASE ACTIVITY.NAME MATCHES ADJUST.AASUSP.ACTIVITIES  -  special case to check for suspense adjustment | GOSUB PROCESS.ACCOUNT.ADJUSTMENTS | CASE ACTIVITY.NAME MATCHES VALID.ADJUSTMENT.ACTIVITIES | GOSUB PROCESS.ACCOUNT.ADJUSTMENTS | CASE ACTIVITY.NAME MATCHES VALID.OTH.ACCOUNT.ACTIVITIES
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: CREDIT ACCOUNT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACCOUNT.CREDIT.b`. Program Description Action to credit an arrangement account
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()[AA.Framework.Sep,1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | ACTIVITY.NAME = AF.Framework.getActivityId()<AA.Framework.ActActivity> | GOSUB GET.ACTIVITY.BALANCES.DETAIL | R.BALANCE.MAINTENANCE<AA.BalanceMaintenance.BalanceMaintenance.BmAdjustProp> = BALANCE.PROPERTY 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: CASE ACTIVITY.NAME MATCHES ADJUST.AASUSP.ACTIVITIES | GOSUB PROCESS.ACCOUNT.ADJUSTMENTS | CASE ACTIVITY.NAME MATCHES VALID.ADJUSTMENT.ACTIVITIES | GOSUB PROCESS.ACCOUNT.ADJUSTMENTS | CASE ACTIVITY.NAME MATCHES VALID.OTH.ACCOUNT.ACTIVITIES
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: REPAY ACCOUNT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACCOUNT.REPAY.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of ACCOUNT property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: REQD.PROCESS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()[AA.Framework.Sep,1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | ACTIVITY.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE REQD.PROCESS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION | CASE REQD.PROCESS = "DELETE" | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error set in the routine | PROCESS.ERROR = "" | REPAY.PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Property name from the template | REPAYMENT.DATE = ACTIVITY.DATE  -  Arrangment activity date | PROPERTY.BALANCE = ""  -  BalanceType associated with the Property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.REPAID.BILLS  -  Get bills which are repaid for the current AAA | PROPERTY.REPAY.AMOUNT = "" | IF NOT(ADVANCE.REPAY) THEN | GOSUB GET.BILL.DETAILS  -  Load bill details record | IF R.BILL.DETAILS AND NOT(RET.ERROR) THEN 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.ACCOUNTING.UPDATES
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: ACTION.DETAILS ACCOUNTING
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACCOUNTING.ACTION.DETAILS.b`. Hard coded routine to return details of exepected event detail for an activity and action within an activity within AA.
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: SYSTEM.ACTIVITY = '' | ACTIVITY.REC = '' | ACTIVITY.CLASS = '' | AA.Framework.LoadStaticData("F.AA.ACTIVITY", ACTIVITY, ACTIVITY.REC, "") | PRODUCT.LINE = ACTIVITY.REC<AA.ProductFramework.Activity.ActProductLine>
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: ACTIVITY.ALLOCATE ACCOUNTING
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACCOUNTING.ACTIVITY.ALLOCATE.b`. Program Description Routine to take an accounting entry from an external application and perform AA processing
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: ARRANGEMENT.COMP = ACCT.REC<AC.AccountOpening.Account.CoCode> | IF ARRANGEMENT.COMP NE EB.SystemTables.getIdCompany() THEN | ACTIVITY = ''  -  The name of the primary activity to run | IF EVENT.DATE = '' THEN | AA.Framework.ActivityInitialise()
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: DISTRIBUTE ACCOUNTING
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACCOUNTING.DISTRIBUTE.b`. Mô tả dưới đây được trích trực tiếp từ thân routine.
actions.steps: 1. `CHECK.PROCESS.AA.ACCOUNT`: IF PROCESS.AA.ACCOUNT THEN | CASE ENTRY.REC<AC.EntryCreation.StmtEntry.SteBalanceType> EQ ''  -  balance type is empty when external call or direct call from accounting | IF ENTRY.TYPE EQ 'INTERNAL' THEN  -  don't process further if for internal transactions | GOSUB UPDATE.BALANCE.TYPE  -  update balance type and return back. accounting will raise error if it is a direct call to the account. | GOSUB RAISE.DORMANCY.OVERRIDE  - Checking the dormancy status for CT/SA/CS accounts 2. `RAISE.DORMANCY.OVERRIDE`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine. 3. `UPDATE.BALANCE.TYPE`: GOSUB GET.AC.BALANCE.TYPE 4. `UPDATE.ITEM.REF`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine. 5. `GET.SUSPENSE.ACCOUNT`: CASE AA.REFERENCE["*",6,1] EQ 'SHADOW' | READ.ERR = "" | R.ACCOUNT.CLASS = AC.Config.AccountClass.CacheRead("AASUSPENSE", READ.ERR) | IF READ.ERR THEN  -  Use the default suspense shouldn't really happen | IF ENTRY.REC<AC.EntryCreation.StmtEntry.SteCurrency> THEN
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: MANAGER ACCOUNTING
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACCOUNTING.MANAGER.b`. Program Description
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Set on any error condition | AAA.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid() | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId() | PROPERTY.ID = EB.SystemTables.getIdNew()  -  Id of current property | ZERO.AUTH = AF.Framework.getC_arrzeroauthoriseinput()
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: POST.PROCESS ACCOUNTING
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACCOUNTING.POST.PROCESS.b`. Program Description This subroutine is called at the end of pre processing in accounting
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: GOSUB RUNNING.UNDER.INTRADAY.PROCESSING ; *To check if we are running under intraday processing | CASE EB.SystemTables.getRVersion(EB.Versions.Version.VerNoOfAuth) = 0 AND (TYPE = 'AUT' AND (EB.SystemTables.getVFunction() AND EB.SystemTables.getVFunction() MATCHES 'I':@VM:'R'))  - For 0 auth version, processing would have happened already | CASE TYPE='AUT' AND EB.SystemTables.getRunningUnderBatch() AND (EB.Service.getRTsaStatus()<EB.Service.TsaStatus.TsTssCurrentService>[1,3] = 'COB' OR IntraDayProcess EQ "Y")  -  Identifies it is a COB run or an Intraday early processing service and stops processing | CASE EB.CMM.getCmmParentId() AND EB.CMM.getCmmOperation() NE "WRITE"  -  When the repo contract input for AR account system should update AA.ACTIVITY.HISTORY based on CMM$OPERATION | CASE 1
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE ACCOUNTING
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACCOUNTING.UPDATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of ACCOUNTING property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Accounting property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.flow: vì không có routine action riêng trong repo hiện tại nên không thể khẳng định thêm bước update bảng/trường nào từ source; phần có thể xác nhận chỉ là lớp field/validate/record ở trên.

actions.name: CALCULATE.COMM ACTIVITY.CHARGES
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACTIVITY.CHARGES.CALCULATE.COMM.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of Activity Charge property class.
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: AAA.ID = AA.Framework.getTxnReference() | R.AA.ARRANGEMENT.ACTIVITY = AA.Framework.getRArrangementActivity() | FIN.ARRANGEMENT = AA.Framework.getRArrangementActivity()<AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActEventId> | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId() | ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getCurrActivity() 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1] | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement activity complete status | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS MATCHES "NEW":@VM:"UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" 3. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB CHECK.ACTIVITY.CHARGES | GOSUB CHECK.PROPERTY.TYPE  -  Get the property type of the charge property | IF ACTIVITY.FOUND OR PERIODIC.CHARGE.TYPE THEN  -  If we found the current activity in ACTIVITY.CHARGES or periodic commission type, proceed | GOSUB PROCESS.ACTIVITY.CHARGES | *** <region name=PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION> 4. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB CHECK.ACTIVITY.CHARGES | GOSUB CHECK.PROPERTY.TYPE | IF ACTIVITY.FOUND OR PERIODIC.CHARGE.TYPE THEN  -  If we found the current activity in ACTIVITY.CHARGES or periodic commission type, proceed | GOSUB DELETE.CHARGE.DETAILS | *** <region name=DELETE.CHARGE.DETAILS> 5. `UPDATE.LOG`: LOG.INFO<AA.Framework.DebugLogDetails.DlRoutine> = "AA.ACTIVITY.CHARGES.CALCULATE.COMM" | IF RET.ERROR THEN | LOG.INFO<AA.Framework.DebugLogDetails.DlKeyName,-1> = "ERROR.DETECTED" | LOG.INFO<AA.Framework.DebugLogDetails.DlKeyValue,-1> = RET.ERROR | AA.Framework.LogManager("UPDATE", "DEBUG", LOG.INFO, "")
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: CALCULATE ACTIVITY.CHARGES
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACTIVITY.CHARGES.CALCULATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of Charge property class.
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: AAA.ID = AA.Framework.getTxnReference() | R.AA.ARRANGEMENT.ACTIVITY = AA.Framework.getRArrangementActivity() | ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getCurrActivity() | THIS.ACTIVITY = FIELD(ACTIVITY.ID, AA.Framework.Sep, 2) | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId() 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1] | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement activity complete status | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS MATCHES "NEW":@VM:"UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" 3. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB CHECK.ACTIVITY.CHARGES | IF ACTIVITY.FOUND THEN  -  If we found the current activity in ACTIVITY.CHARGES, proceed | GOSUB PROCESS.ACTIVITY.CHARGES | *** <region name=PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION> 4. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB CHECK.ACTIVITY.CHARGES | IF ACTIVITY.FOUND THEN | GOSUB DELETE.CHARGE.DETAILS | IF THIS.ACTIVITY EQ "NEW" THEN  -  When New arrangement activity is reveresed or deleted, delete its corresponding evaluation details records | GOSUB DEL.EVALUATION.DETAILS 5. `UPDATE.LOG`: LOG.INFO<AA.Framework.DebugLogDetails.DlRoutine> = "AA.ACTIVITY.CHARGES.CALCULATE" | IF RET.ERROR THEN | LOG.INFO<AA.Framework.DebugLogDetails.DlKeyName,-1> = "ERROR.DETECTED" | LOG.INFO<AA.Framework.DebugLogDetails.DlKeyValue,-1> = RET.ERROR | AA.Framework.LogManager("UPDATE", "DEBUG", LOG.INFO, "")
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE ACTIVITY.CHARGES
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACTIVITY.CHARGES.UPDATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of ACTIVITY.CHARGES property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Activity Charges property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change | IF AA.PRODUCT.LINE MATCHES 'AGENT':@VM:'REWARDS' THEN  -  Only for AGENT/REWARDS line | CALL AA.DEFAULT.AGENT.EVENT  -  To default the agent activity in AGENT product line. 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE ACTIVITY.MAPPING
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACTIVITY.MAPPING.UPDATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of ACTIVITY.MAPPING property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Accounting property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: SEND.MESSAGE ACTIVITY.MESSAGING
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACTIVITY.MESSAGING.SEND.MESSAGE.b`. Program Description The action routine is performed on the ACTIVITY.MESSAGING property class
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Activity Messaging property | DEL.REF = ''; RET.ERROR = ''; PROCESS.ERROR = '' | ACTIVITY.CODE = '' | OVERDUE.ACTIVITY = '' 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine. 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE ACTIVITY.MESSAGING
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACTIVITY.MESSAGING.UPDATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of ACTIVITY.MESSAGING property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: * GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.REVERSE.DELETE.ACTION  -  Reversal Delete processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Activity Messaging property | EFFECTIVE.DATE = '' 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: IF AA.Framework.getNewArrangement() OR CURRENT.ACTIVITY EQ "UPDATE" THEN | PRE.NOTICE.ACTIVITY = EB.SystemTables.getRNew(EB.SystemTables.getAf())<1,ACT.NO> | GOSUB GET.SCHEDULED.ACTIVITY.DATE  -  Check whether the activity is present in AA.SCHEDULED.ACTIVITY | IF BASE.DATE THEN  -  If exist | GOSUB SCHEDULE.PRE.NOTICE.ACTIVITY  -  Find the date on which prenotice activity should triger 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: IF NOT(AA.Framework.getRenewalActivity()) THEN | PROCESS.MODE = "DELETE" | PRE.NOTICE.ACTIVITY = EB.SystemTables.getRNew(EB.SystemTables.getAf())<1,ACT.NO> | GOSUB UPDATE.SCHEDULED.ACTIVITY | AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE ACTIVITY.PRESENTATION
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACTIVITY.PRESENTATION.UPDATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of ACTIVITY.PRESENTATION property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Activity presentation property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: ALTERNATE ACTIVITY.RESTRICTION
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACTIVITY.RESTRICTION.ALTERNATE.b`. Program Description
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getCurrActivity()  -  Activity Id | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Payment Schedule property | CURRENT.ACTIVITY.CLASS = "" 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB CHECK.ALTERNATE.INTEREST 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: EVALUATE ACTIVITY.RESTRICTION
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACTIVITY.RESTRICTION.EVALUATE.b`. Program Description
actions.steps: 1. `DELETE.CHARGE.DETAILS`: IF AppMethod<1,Ccnt> EQ "DEFER" THEN | AA.ActivityCharges.ProcessChargeDetails(ArrangementId, ChargeId, ArrActivityId, 'DELETE', 'ACTIVITY', RChargeDetails, RET.ERROR) | IF ActivityFullStatus EQ "DELETE" THEN | AA.ActivityRestriction.UpdateRuleSetEvaluationDetails("DELETE", "")  -  delete the evaluation record if present 2. `UPDATE.CHARGE.DETAILS`: IF AppMethod<1,Ccnt> EQ "DEFER" THEN | ARR.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId() | CHARGE.DETAILS.ID = ARR.ID:AA.Framework.Sep:ChargeId | AA.ActivityCharges.ProcessChargeDetails(ArrangementId, ChargeId, ArrActivityId, 'DELETE', 'ACTIVITY', RChargeDetails, RET.ERROR)
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: MAINTAIN ACTIVITY.RESTRICTION
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACTIVITY.RESTRICTION.MAINTAIN.b`. <region name= PROGRAM DESCRIPTION>
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.REVERSE.DELETE.ACTION  -  Reversal Delete processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  activity restriction property | CUR.EFFECTIVE.DATE = EFFECTIVE.DATE  -  Effective date | R.ARRANGEMENT = AA.Framework.getRArrangement()  -  Arrangement record | REVIEW.ACTIVITY = PRODUCT.LINE:AA.Framework.Sep:"PERIODIC.REVIEW":AA.Framework.Sep:PROPERTY  -  periodic review activity 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: CASE PERIODIC.REVIEW.FQU | IF NOT(RET.ERROR) THEN | GOSUB GET.SCHEDULE.MODE  -  Get scheduled activity updating mode | GOSUB UPDATE.SCHEDULED.ACTIVITY  -  Update Scheduled Activity | CASE NOT(PERIODIC.REVIEW.FQU) 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.LAST.DATE  -  Get the date on which the activity was last triggered | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: PROP.EVALUATE ACTIVITY.RESTRICTION
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACTIVITY.RESTRICTION.PROP.EVALUATE.b`. Mô tả dưới đây được trích trực tiếp từ thân routine.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION 3. `INITIALISE`: PROCESS.ERROR = '' | PRIMARY.ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = '' | GOSUB GET.PARTICIPANT.DETAILS  -  Get participant related details 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: IF PARTICIPANTS.LIST THEN | GOSUB PROCESS.BILLS 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: IF PARTICIPANTS.LIST THEN | GOSUB PROCESS.BILLS
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE ACTIVITY.RESTRICTION
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ACTIVITY.RESTRICTION.UPDATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of ACTIVITY.RESTRICTION property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Customer property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change

actions.name: CALCULATE AGENT.COMMISSION
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.AGENT.COMMISSION.CALCULATE.b`. Program Description Action routine for Agent Commission Property Class.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement activity complete status | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id | PROPERTY.ID = AF.Framework.getPropertyId() 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE ; *To initialise variables | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV"  -  Delete-Rev processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "AUTH-REV" | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' 3. `INITIALISE`: ARRANGEMENT.REC = ""

actions.name: UPDATE AGENT.COMMISSION
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.AGENT.COMMISSION.UPDATE.b`. Program Description Action routine for Agent Commission Property Class.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.AGCOMM.REC = '' ; R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = '' ; R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = '' ; AA.CUSTOMER = '' | R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | AA.CUSTOMER = AA.Framework.getC_aalocarrangementrec()<AA.Framework.Arrangement.ArrCustomer> | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV"  -  Delete-Rev processing | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION 3. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.REVERSE.ACTION 4. `PROCESS.REVERSE.ACTION`: tmp.AA$NEW.ARRANGEMENT = AA.Framework.getNewArrangement() | IF NOT(tmp.AA$NEW.ARRANGEMENT) AND LINK.TYPE EQ "REWARDS" THEN | AA.Framework.setNewArrangement(tmp.AA$NEW.ARRANGEMENT) | SYSTEM.ACTIVITY = 'UPDATE.REWARDS' | GOSUB UPDATE.ARRANGEMENT 5. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: CASE (R.ACTIVITY.STATUS EQ 'UNAUTH' OR R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS EQ "DELETE-REV") AND AA.Framework.getNewArrangement() AND LINK.TYPE EQ "REWARDS" | SYSTEM.ACTIVITY = 'UPDATE.REWARDS' | IF AGENT.ARR.IDS THEN | GOSUB UPDATE.ARRANGEMENT | CASE (R.ACTIVITY.STATUS EQ 'UNAUTH' OR R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS EQ "DELETE-REV") AND THIS.ACTIVITY EQ 'UPDATE' AND LINK.TYPE EQ "REWARDS"
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: EVALUATE ALERTS
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ALERTS.EVALUATE.b`. Program Description Write Description of Action routine
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Full status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: * GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | SOURCE.PROPERTY = "" | EFFECTIVE.DATE = "" 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine. 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: SUBSCRIBE ALERTS
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ALERTS.SUBSCRIBE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of ALERTS property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Customer property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine. 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.steps: rà các file cùng class cho thấy chỉ có ``AA.AZ.CR.CARD.FIELDS.b`, `AA.AZ.CR.CARD.RECORD.b``.

fields.name: AA.AZD.ACTION
fields.meaning: slot `2` trong `I_F.AA.AZ.DEPOSIT`; evidence usage: `AZ.DEPOSIT.REVERSAL.b:195` ghi `AZ.TXN.CODE = AZ.SE.REC<AC.STE.TRANSACTION.CODE>`; `AZ.DEPOSIT.ACCOUNTING.b:491` ghi `ENTRY<AC.STE.TRANSACTION.CODE> = TXN.CODE`; `AZ.DEPOSIT.CREDIT.PROCESS.b:119` ghi `* $INSERT I_F.TRANSACTION ;*BG_100008570 S/E`.

actions.name: NO DIRECT ACTION AZ.DEPOSIT

actions.flow: vì không có routine action riêng trong repo hiện tại nên không thể khẳng định thêm bước update bảng/trường nào từ source; phần có thể xác nhận chỉ là lớp field/validate/record ở trên.

actions.flow: vì không có routine action riêng trong repo hiện tại nên không thể khẳng định thêm bước update bảng/trường nào từ source; phần có thể xác nhận chỉ là lớp field/validate/record ở trên.

actions.name: NO DIRECT ACTION AZ.SAVINGS
actions.summary: trong repo hiện có không tìm thấy routine action riêng map trực tiếp cho `AZ.SAVINGS`; chỉ thấy các routine metadata/validation.
actions.steps: rà các file cùng class cho thấy chỉ có ``AA.AZ.SAVINGS.FIELDS.b``.
actions.flow: vì không có routine action riêng trong repo hiện tại nên không thể khẳng định thêm bước update bảng/trường nào từ source; phần có thể xác nhận chỉ là lớp field/validate/record ở trên.

fields.name: AA.BA.ACTIVITY
fields.meaning: slot `1` trong `I_F.AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY`; evidence usage: `AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.FIELDS.b:15` ghi `SUBROUTINE AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.FIELDS(OUT.ASSOC, OUT.F, OUT.N, OUT.T, OUT.CHECKFILE, OUT.RULE.TYPE, OUT.MAND, OUT.ACTIVITY.LIST)`; `AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.VALIDATE.b:100` ghi `ACTIVITY.CLASS = EB.SystemTables.getRNew(AA.BalanceAvailability.BalanceAvailability.BaActivityClass) ;* get the activity classes defined`; `AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.UPDATE.b:61` ghi `GOSUB SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`.

fields.name: AA.BA.ACTION
fields.meaning: slot `2` trong `I_F.AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY`; evidence usage: `AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.FIELDS.b:125` ghi `OUT.ASSOC<Z> = "XX-" ; OUT.F<Z> = "OVERDRAWN.ACTION" ; OUT.N<Z> = "10..C" ; OUT.T<Z> = "" ; OUT.T<Z,2> = "POST_REJECT_SETTLE"`; `AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.VALIDATE.b:104` ghi `OVERDRAWN.ACTION = EB.SystemTables.getRNew(AA.BalanceAvailability.BalanceAvailability.BaOverdrawnAction) ;* get the overdraft action for the`; `AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.UPDATE.b:16` ghi `* @uses I_AA.APP.COMMON I_AA.ACTION.CONTEXT`.

fields.name: AA.BA.NOTICE.AMOUNT
fields.meaning: slot `3` trong `I_F.AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY`; định nghĩa trong `FIELDS` với assoc `XX<`, format `19..C`, type `AMT`; evidence usage: `AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.FIELDS.b:68` ghi `OUT.ASSOC<Z> = "XX<" ; OUT.F<Z> ="NOTICE.AMOUNT" ; OUT.N<Z> = "19..C" ; OUT.T<Z> = "AMT"`; `AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.VALIDATE.b:210` ghi `NOTICE.AMOUNT = EB.SystemTables.getRNew(tmp.AF)<1,EB.SystemTables.getAv()>`.

fields.name: AA.BA.NOTICE.PERIOD
fields.meaning: slot `4` trong `I_F.AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY`; định nghĩa trong `FIELDS` với assoc `XX-`, format `5..C`, type `PERIOD`; evidence usage: `AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.FIELDS.b:38` ghi `* NOTICE.PERIOD field length increased to 5 characters`.

fields.name: AA.BA.NOTICE.AVAILABILITY
fields.meaning: slot `5` trong `I_F.AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY`; định nghĩa trong `FIELDS` với assoc `XX>`, format `3..C`, type `A`; evidence usage: `AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.FIELDS.b:34` ghi `* System is not allowing more than two characters in NOTICE.AVAILABILITY field.`.

fields.name: AA.BA.CREDIT.CHECK
fields.meaning: slot `6` trong `I_F.AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY`; định nghĩa trong `FIELDS` với format `9..C`; evidence usage: `AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.FIELDS.b:83` ghi `OUT.ASSOC<Z> = "" ; OUT.F<Z> ="CREDIT.CHECK" ; OUT.N<Z> = "9..C" ; OUT.T<Z> = "" ; OUT.T<Z,2> = "WORKING_FORWARD_AVAILABLE_AVAILWORK_AVAILFW`; `AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.VALIDATE.b:102` ghi `ACT.CREDIT.CHECK = EB.SystemTables.getRNew(AA.BalanceAvailability.BalanceAvailability.BaActCreditCheck) ;* get the credit check setup for th`.

fields.name: AA.BA.AVAIL.BAL.UPD
fields.meaning: slot `7` trong `I_F.AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY`; định nghĩa trong `FIELDS` với format `7..C`; evidence usage: `AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.FIELDS.b:88` ghi `OUT.ASSOC<Z> = "" ; OUT.F<Z> ="AVAIL.BAL.UPD" ; OUT.N<Z> = "7..C" ; OUT.T<Z> = "" ; OUT.T<Z,2> = "BOTH_NONE_DEBITS_CREDITS"`.

actions.name: UPDATE BALANCE.AVAILABILITY
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.BALANCE.AVAILABILITY.UPDATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of BALANCE.AVAILABILITY property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Customer property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE BALANCE.MAINTENANCE
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.BALANCE.MAINTENANCE.UPDATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of BALANCE.MAINTENANCE property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine. 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine. 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: CAPTURE.BILL BALANCE.MAINTENANCE
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.BALANCE.MAINTENANCE.CAPTURE.BILL.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of BALANCE.MAINTENANCE property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Deletion of reversal processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = "" ; PROCESS.ERROR = "" ; BILL.DET.ERROR = ""  -  Error variables | ARRANGEMENT.INFO = "" | IF RET.ERROR THEN | GOSUB HANDLE.ERROR | IF R.OVERDUE<AA.Overdue.Overdue.OdBillSettlement> MATCHES "BILL.TOTAL" THEN  -  Deliquency processing is done when BILL.SETTLEMENT is set to BILL.TOTAL 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.BILL.UPDATES 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.BILL.UPDATES.REVERSAL
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE BUNDLE.HIERARCHY
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.BUNDLE.HIERARCHY.UPDATE.b`. Program Description
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | PROCESSING.MODE = AA.Framework.getAaMasterActivity()<1,3,AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActProcessingMode>  -  get Processing mode 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.REVERSE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  BundleHierarchy property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next condition change. 5. `PROCESS.AUTHORISE.ACTION`: ARR.STATUS = AA.Framework.getRArrangement()<AA.Framework.Arrangement.ArrArrStatus> | IF NOT(LIVE.DATE) THEN | CROSS.POOL = AA.Framework.getCrossPool()  - this common will be set during cross pool movement | IF CROSS.POOL<1> THEN  - if old arrangemet is present then, get Live date from its PoolOrchestrationDetails | GOSUB LOAD.OTHER.COMPANY ; *Load other company if the bundle is in different company
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: EXPIRE CDP.CONSENT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CDP.CONSENT.EXPIRE.b`. Program Description This section initialises Arrangement Activity related information
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS MATCHES "UNAUTH":@VM:"UNAUTH-CHG" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PropertyId = AF.Framework.getPropertyId() 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next condition change. 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next condition change.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE CDP.CONSENT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CDP.CONSENT.UPDATE.b`. Program Description
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS MATCHES "UNAUTH":@VM:"UNAUTH-CHG" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | ID.COMPONENT<AA.Framework.IdcArrNo> = ARRANGEMENT.ID | ID.COMPONENT<AA.Framework.IdcProperty> = PropertyId | ID.COMPONENT<AA.Framework.IdcEffDate> = EFFECTIVE.DATE 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next condition change. 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next condition change.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: REMOVE CHANGE.PRODUCT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CHANGE.PRODUCT.REMOVE.b`. Program Description
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: ACTIVITY.EFF.DATE = ''  -  Activity Effective Date.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE CHANGE.PRODUCT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CHANGE.PRODUCT.UPDATE.b`. Program Description 04/08/08 - BG_100017435
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getActivityId()  -  Activity name | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement Id | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Current property | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Effective date of the change | R.ARRANGEMENT = AA.Framework.getRArrangement()  -  Arrangement id 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: REQD.PROCESS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1] | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | CASE REQD.PROCESS MATCHES "NEW":@VM:"UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" 3. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: IF RETURN.ERROR THEN  -  Current product is not part of bundle. Through error | EB.SystemTables.setEtext(RETURN.ERROR) | EB.ErrorProcessing.StoreEndError() | CURRENT.PROPERTY.CLASS = "" | PROPERTY.NAME = ACTIVITY.ID<AA.Framework.ActObject> 4. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION 5. `PROCESS.REVERSE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE CHANNEL.ACCESS
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CHANNEL.ACCESS.UPDATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of CHANNEL.ACCESS property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Accounting property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CHARGE.OVERRIDE.UPDATE.b`. Program Description
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS MATCHES "NEW":@VM:"UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Charge Override property | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate() 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: IF (R.CHARGE.OVERRIDE<AA.ChargeOverride.ChargeOverride.CoProperty>) THEN | PROPERTY.LIST = R.CHARGE.OVERRIDE<AA.ChargeOverride.ChargeOverride.CoProperty> | PROPERTY.LIST.COUNT = DCOUNT(PROPERTY.LIST, @VM) | FOR PROP.COUNT = 1 TO PROPERTY.LIST.COUNT | GOSUB UPDATE.TOT.AMT 5. `PROCESS.AUTHORISE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: ISSUE.BILL CHARGE
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CHARGE.ISSUE.BILL.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of Charge property class. This action will be added dynamically
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement activity complete status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | PRIMARY.ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = '' 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Deletion of reversal processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY.ID = AF.Framework.getPropertyId() | PAYOFF$CHARGE.PROPERTY = "" | GOSUB CHECK.PAYOFF.PROCESS.REQD  -  check if payoff processing is required 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: IF PARTICIPANTS.LIST THEN | IF FULL.CHARGEOFF THEN | PROPERTY.ID<2> = "CO"  -  pass sub type as CO to get co amounts from charge details | GOSUB GET.CHARGE.DETAILS  -  Get the charge.details record for ARR.ID-CHARGE.IDCO | IF FULL.CHARGEOFF THEN 5. `PROCESS.AUTHORISE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: ACCRUE CHARGE
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CHARGE.ACCRUE.b`. Action routine
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE  -  Perform Initial Processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION 3. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB CHECK.TO.CLOSE.AMORTISATION | IF DUES.SETTLED<3> EQ 1 THEN | PAYMENT.DATE = EFFECTIVE.DATE | AA.Framework.AccrualDetailsHandoff(ARRANGEMENT.ID, PROCESS.TYPE, AMORT.TYPE, PROPERTY, PAYMENT.DATE, "", "", "", "", "", PAYMENT.DATE, RETURN.ERROR) 4. `PROCESS.REVERSE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION 5. `PROCESS.AUTHORISE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.EB.ACCRUAL
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE CHARGEOFF
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CHARGEOFF.UPDATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of CHARGEOFF property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Customer property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: EVALUATE CHARGEOFF
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CHARGEOFF.EVALUATE.b`. Program Description This action routine is part of CHARGEOFF property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | CURR.ACTIVITY = R.ACTIVITY<AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActActivity>  -  Get the current processing activity | ACTIVITY.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Deletion of reversal processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "DELETE" 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = "" | GOSUB GET.CHARGEOFF.ORDER  -  Get the charge off order | GOSUB GET.CHARGEOFF.AMOUNT  -  TXN amount from AAA 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB CHARGEOFF.PROCESSING 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB CHARGEOFF.PROCESSING
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

fields.name: AA.CLS.ACTIVITY

fields.name: AA.CLS.ACTION
fields.meaning: slot `2` trong `I_F.AA.CLOSURE`; evidence usage: `AA.CLOSURE.CLOSE.b:36` ghi `* @uses I_AA.APP.COMMON I_AA.ACTION.CONTEXT`; `AA.CLOSURE.VALIDATE.b:140` ghi `ACTVITY.ACTION = "SETTLE-PAYOFF":@VM:"CALCULATE-PAYOFF"`; `AA.CLOSURE.UPDATE.b:24` ghi `* @uses I_AA.APP.COMMON I_AA.ACTION.CONTEXT`.

fields.name: AA.CLS.CLOSURE.TYPE
fields.meaning: slot `3` trong `I_F.AA.CLOSURE`; định nghĩa trong `FIELDS` với format `13..`; evidence usage: `AA.CLOSURE.FIELDS.b:73` ghi `OUT.ASSOC<Z> = "" ; OUT.F<Z> = "CLOSURE.TYPE" ; OUT.N<Z> = "13.." ; OUT.T<Z,2> = "MATURITY_BALANCE_DEFER.CLOSURE" ;* New type Defer closure `; `AA.CLOSURE.VALIDATE.b:166` ghi `EB.SystemTables.setEtext("AA.CLS.CLOSURE.TYPE.NOT.ALLOWED")`.

fields.name: AA.CLS.CLOSURE.PERIOD
fields.meaning: slot `4` trong `I_F.AA.CLOSURE`; định nghĩa trong `FIELDS` với format `4..`, type `PERIOD`; evidence usage: `AA.CLOSURE.FIELDS.b:51` ghi `* New field DEFER.CLOSURE.PERIOD, new closure type DEFER.CLOSURE introduced to support deferring closure period functionality`; `AA.CLOSURE.RECORD.b:43` ghi `* New field DEFER.CLOSURE.PERIOD introduced to support deferring closure period functionality is made NOINPUT (Blocker)`; `AA.CLOSURE.VALIDATE.b:70` ghi `* Validations done for new field DEFER.CLOSURE.PERIOD and new closure type DEFER.CLOSURE which was introduced`.

fields.name: AA.CLS.CLOSURE.METHOD
fields.meaning: slot `5` trong `I_F.AA.CLOSURE`; định nghĩa trong `FIELDS` với format `10..`; evidence usage: `AA.CLOSURE.CLOSE.b:87` ghi `* If the CLOSURE.METHOD is set to online then process ACCOUNT.CLOSURE with online flag set for`; `AA.CLOSURE.FIELDS.b:42` ghi `* New option ONLINE is introduced in CLOSURE.METHOD field for online closure`; `AA.CLOSURE.UPDATE.b:70` ghi `* CLOSURE.METHOD is specified as ONLINE in closure property`.

fields.name: AA.CLS.POSTING.RESTRICT
fields.meaning: slot `6` trong `I_F.AA.CLOSURE`; định nghĩa trong `FIELDS` với format `5..`, checkfile `POSTING.RESTRICT`; evidence usage: `AA.CLOSURE.CLOSE.b:112` ghi `* While committing close activity POSTING.RESTRICT value is defaulted as 90`; `AA.CLOSURE.FIELDS.b:88` ghi `OUT.ASSOC<Z> = "" ; OUT.F<Z> = "POSTING.RESTRICT" ; OUT.N<Z> = "5.." ; OUT.T<Z,2> = "90...99"`; `AA.CLOSURE.VALIDATE.b:46` ghi `* System should validate the POSTING.RESTRICT field in order to input a mandatory value`.

fields.name: AA.CLS.CLOSURE.ACTIVITY

CLOSURE.ACTIVITY should be mandatory when`.

actions.name: CLOSE CLOSURE
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CLOSURE.CLOSE.b`. This action routine is part of CLOSURE property class and would run as part of LENDING-CLOSE-ARRANGEMENT Activity.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = "" | ACTIVITY.RUN.DATE = "" | ACTIVITY.EFF.DATE = "" | ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getCurrActivity() | PRODUCT.LINE = R.ARRANGEMENT<AA.Framework.Arrangement.ArrProductLine> 3. `PROCESS.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'UNAUTH' | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'AUTH' 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: CASE DUE.SETTLED = "TRUE" AND R.ARRANGEMENT<AA.Framework.Arrangement.ArrArrStatus> NE "PENDING.CLOSURE" AND PRODUCT.LINE EQ "ACCOUNTS"  -  We are allowing now user to do direct closure for Accounts contract, in this case before closure activity triggered arrangement status is AUTH | IF RETURN.ERROR<1,ERR.CNT>[1,2] EQ "E:" THEN | RET.ERROR = "" | RET.ERROR = RETURN.ERROR<1,ERR.CNT> | GOSUB HANDLE.ERRORS 5. `PROCESS.AUTHORISE.ACTION`: IF NOT(AF.Framework.getC_arrzeroauthoriseinput()) THEN  -  Do not form authorisation msg if processed through not zero authoriser version | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS EQ "AUTH-REV" | CASE 1 | GOSUB UPDATE.ACCOUNT.CLOSURE.RECORD  -  Update POSTING.RESTRICT / CLOSURE.METHOD in Account Closure Record | GOSUB PROCESS.ACCOUNT.CLOSURE
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: EVALUATE CLOSURE
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CLOSURE.EVALUATE.b`. Program Description This action routine is part of CLOSURE property class and would run as part of
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getActivityId()<AA.Framework.ActActivity>  -  Activity Id 2. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId() | RET.ERROR = '' | GOSUB GET.ACCOUNT.DETAILS  -  Get the Account details. 3. `PROCESS.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "AUTH-REV" | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "AUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.AUTHORISE.ACTION  -  Authorisation processing 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.PROPERTY.RECORD  -  Get Closure Property Record. | CASE AF.Framework.getActivityId()<AA.Framework.ActActivity> EQ "AUTO.CLOSE" | IF AA.Framework.getRArrangement()<AA.Framework.Arrangement.ArrArrStatus> NE "CLOSE" THEN | GOSUB DETERMINE.DUE.AND.UPDATE | CASE R.CLOSURE<AA.Closure.Closure.ClsClosureMethod> EQ "AUTOMATIC" 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB UPDATE.SCHEDULE.ACTIVITY
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE CLOSURE
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CLOSURE.UPDATE.b`. The action routine is part of CLOSURE property class and would run as part of "Update action on Closure" Activity.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | ACTIVITY.DATE = "" | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Account property | R.ARRANGEMENT = AA.Framework.getRArrangement() 3. `PROCESS.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.REVERSE.ACTION  -  Deletion of Rev (for New Arrangement) | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.ACCOUNT.RECORD  -  Get account property record for the given arrangement | IF EB.SystemTables.getRNew(AA.Closure.Closure.ClsCoolingPeriod) NE "" THEN | GOSUB UPDATE.COOLING.CHANGES  - Update the cooling date changes to the account details table | IF PROCESS EQ "REVERSE" THEN | GOSUB GET.DEFER.CLOSURE.DATE  -  Get defer closure date based on defer period and update it in account details table 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB CHECK.NAU.LIST  -  Check whether i am in delete nau job. | ** If New arrangement activity is NAU before running cob as a part of AA.DELETE.NAU.ACTIVITY system used to delete the | CASE AA.Framework.getNewArrangement() AND IS.DELETE.NAU.ACTIVITY | CASE NOT(AA.Framework.getNewArrangement()) | SEARCH.ID = ARR.ACTIVITY.ID:"*DELETE"  -  Search string to find whether the DELETE action comes from C-O-C or Normal DELETE action
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE CONSTRAINT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CONSTRAINT.UPDATE.b`. Program Description This section sets up different processing modules for the action routine
actions.steps: 1. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 2. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Customer property | R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status 3. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine. 4. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine. 5. `PROCESS.AUTHORISE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE CUSTOMER
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.CUSTOMER.UPDATE.b`. Program Description Action routine for Customer Property Class. At the momement does not
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | GOSUB CHECK.UPDATE.CUSTOMER  - Check for customer updation | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV"  -  Delete-Rev processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | CurrentActivityClass = AA.Framework.getRArrangementActivity()<AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActActivityClass> | CurrActivity = FIELD(CurrentActivityClass, AA.Framework.Sep, 2,2)  -  it will be Change-Customer Activity | InitiationType = AA.Framework.getRArrangementActivity()<AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActInitiationType>  -  Get the initiation type 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: IF CurrActivity EQ 'CHANGE-CUSTOMER' THEN  -  Don't update for New arrangement activity. Since we update at activity manager level itself. | GOSUB UPDATE.ARRANGEMENT  -  Update arrangement with New customers and Roles | AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.REVERSE.ACTION | AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: MAINTAIN ELIGIBILITY
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ELIGIBILITY.MAINTAIN.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of ELIGIBILITY property class
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.REVERSE.DELETE.ACTION  -  Reversal Delete processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Customer property | R.AA.ARRANGEMENT = AA.Framework.getRArrangement() 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: RESET.ACTIVITY = PRODUCT.LINE:AA.Framework.Sep:"PERIODIC.ELIGIBILITY":AA.Framework.Sep:"ARRANGEMENT" | IF R.AA.ARRANGEMENT<AA.Framework.Arrangement.ArrEligibilityReview, 1> = "MANUAL" THEN | IF PERIODIC.REVIEW THEN | LAST.REVIEW.DATE = EFFECTIVE.DATE | IF NOT(Y.ERR) THEN 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: IF PERIODIC.REVIEW THEN | NEXT.CYCLED.DATE = EFFECTIVE.DATE | RESET.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getCurrActivity() | GOSUB UPDATE.SCHEDULED.ACTIVITY | AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: POST.PROCESS ELIGIBILITY
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.ELIGIBILITY.POST.PROCESS.b`. Mô tả dưới đây được trích trực tiếp từ thân routine.
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: ACTIVITY.CLASS = EB.SystemTables.getRNew(AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActActivityClass) | PRODUCT.LINE = FIELD(ACTIVITY.CLASS, AA.Framework.Sep, 1)  -  Product line | THIS.ACTIVITY = FIELD(ACTIVITY.CLASS, AA.Framework.Sep, 2)  -  Current activity to process | THIS.OBJECT = FIELD(ACTIVITY.CLASS, AA.Framework.Sep, 3)  -  Target property class

actions.name: GET.DATA.ELEMENT.VALUE EVIDENCE
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.EVIDENCE.GET.DATA.ELEMENT.VALUE.b`. Mô tả dưới đây được trích trực tiếp từ thân routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE EVIDENCE
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.EVIDENCE.UPDATE.b`. Program Description Action routine for Evidence Property Class.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | IF DoProcess THEN | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" 3. `INITIALISE`: ArrangementRef = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement Reference | ArrActivity = AF.Framework.getCurrActivity()  - Arrangement Activity | EffectiveDate = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Effective Date | AAAId = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | ArrangementActivityRecord = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  get AAA record from common 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine. 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE INHERITANCE
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.INHERITANCE.UPDATE.b`. Mô tả dưới đây được trích trực tiếp từ thân routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

fields.name: AA.ICOMP.ACTIVITY

actions.name: CLOSE INTEREST.COMPENSATION
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.INTEREST.COMPENSATION.CLOSE.b`. This section initialises Arrangement Activity related information
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE INTEREST.COMPENSATION
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.INTEREST.COMPENSATION.UPDATE.b`. Mô tả dưới đây được trích trực tiếp từ thân routine.
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: PROPERTY.LIST = '' | PB.PROPERTY = "" | EFFECTIVE.DATE = "" | R.BUN.ARRANGEMENT = '' | R.ARRANGEMENT.SAVE = AA.Framework.getRArrangement()
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: ACCRUE INTEREST
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.INTEREST.ACCRUE.b`. Program Description
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE  -  Perform Initial Processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.REVERSE.DELETE.ACTION 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY.DETAILS = '' | INTEREST.PROPERTY.RECORD = LOWER(R.INTEREST.RECORD) | INT.PROP = FIELD(ACTIVITY.ID, AA.Framework.Sep, 3) 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: IF NOT(PARTICIPANT.FLAG) THEN | GOSUB CHECK.SUSPENSION  -  Check if the property is set for suspension | IF NOT(PROJECTION.INFO) THEN  -  Raise accounting and update interest accruals if projection details exist | GOSUB PROCESS.ACCRUAL  -  if no projection details, then do accrual process
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: MAKE.DUE INTEREST
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.INTEREST.MAKE.DUE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of Interest property class and is used
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.REVERSE.DELETE.ACTION  -  Reversal Delete processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Interest property | PROPERTY.AMOUNT = '' | DUE.PROPERTY.AMOUNT = "" 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.BALANCE.TYPES  -  Get the Balance types to be used | GOSUB GET.BILL  -  Get the Bill references | GOSUB GET.AA.INTEREST.ACCRUALS  - Get AA.INTERST.ACCRUALS | GOSUB GET.BILL.DETAILS  -  Get Bill details record | IF PROPERTY MATCHES BILL.DETAILS<AA.PaymentSchedule.BillDetails.BdProperty> AND BILL.DETAILS<AA.PaymentSchedule.BillDetails.BdPaymentMethod,1> MATCHES "DUE":@VM:"PAY" THEN 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.ACCOUNTING.UPDATES
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.
