actions.name: UPDATE LIMIT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.LIMIT.UPDATE.b`. Program Description Action routine for Limit Property Class. Should only be part of amendment
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.FULL.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Full arrangement activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | ARR.DETS = ARRANGEMENT.ID | ARR.DETS<2> = AA.Framework.getLinkedAccount() | IF EB.SystemTables.getROld(AA.Limit.Limit.LimLimitReference) AND EB.SystemTables.getROld(AA.Limit.Limit.LimLimitSerial) THEN 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: IF FACILITY.UNDER.DEAL AND (NOT(EB.SystemTables.getRNew(AA.Limit.Limit.LimLimit)) OR MANAGE.LIMIT EQ "YES") THEN | GOSUB AUTOMATIC.UTILISED.LIMIT.PROCESS | IF UpdateLinkedContract THEN  -  Update the table ValidationLimitContracts during INPUT activity of new arrangement 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.PREVIOUS.LIMIT.RECORD  -  fetch the previous limit record to get the Old limit ref | IF PRODUCT.LINE EQ "FACILITY" AND MANAGE.LIMIT EQ "YES" THEN | GOSUB AUTOMATIC.UTILISED.LIMIT.PROCESS | IF UpdateLinkedContract AND R.FULL.ACTIVITY.STATUS EQ "DELETE" THEN  -  Update the table ValidationLimitContracts during DELETE activity of new arrangement
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: CHANGE LIMIT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.LIMIT.CHANGE.b`. Program Description
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: ARR.NO = AA.Framework.getArrId() | EFF.DATE = AA.Framework.getPropEffDate() | TERM.AMT.PROPERTY = '' | BALANCE.PROPERTY = '' | R.PROPERTY.RECORD = "" 2. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: ARR.CCY = AA.Framework.getArrCurrency() | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 3. `PROCESS.ACTION`: REQD.PROCESS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1] | R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1] | R.FULL.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() | CASE REQD.PROCESS MATCHES "NEW":@VM:"UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB CHECK.CUSTOMER.CHANGE  -  check if the customer was changed | CASE NEW.LIMIT  - For new limit processing | GOSUB NEW.LIMIT.PROCESS | GOSUB GET.PREVIOUS.LIMIT.RECORD  -  fetch the previous limit record to get the Old limit ref | IF PRODUCT.LINE EQ 'FACILITY' AND MANAGE.LIMIT EQ 'YES' THEN 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB CHECK.CUSTOMER.CHANGE  -  check if the customer was changed | GOSUB GET.PREVIOUS.LIMIT.RECORD  -  fetch the previous limit record to get the Old limit ref | IF PRODUCT.LINE EQ 'FACILITY' AND MANAGE.LIMIT EQ 'YES' THEN | GOSUB AUTO.UTILITATION.LIMIT.PROCESS
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: NO DIRECT ACTION MG.OTH.COND

actions.steps: rà các file cùng class cho thấy chỉ có ``AA.MG.OTH.COND.FIELDS.b``.
actions.flow: vì không có routine action riêng trong repo hiện tại nên không thể khẳng định thêm bước update bảng/trường nào từ source; phần có thể xác nhận chỉ là lớp field/validate/record ở trên.

actions.name: UPDATE OFFICERS
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.OFFICERS.UPDATE.b`. Program Description
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Officers property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next condition change. 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next condition change.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: AGE.CAP.BILLS OVERDUE
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.OVERDUE.AGE.CAP.BILLS.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of OVERDUE property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()[AA.Framework.Sep,1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Deletion of reversal processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = "" | OVERDUE.PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId() | ARR.START.DATE = AA.Framework.getRArrangement()<AA.Framework.Arrangement.ArrStartDate> 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: IF NOT(PROCESS.TYPE) THEN | GOSUB PROCESS.BILL.UPDATES 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: CHANGE.STATUS OVERDUE
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.OVERDUE.CHANGE.STATUS.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of OVERDUE property class and would run as part of
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()[AA.Framework.Sep,1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | CURR.PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId() 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() EQ "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY.ID = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Overdue property | CURRENT.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getActivityId()<AA.Framework.ActActivity> | VALID.RECALC.ACTIVITIES = "APPLYPAYMENT":@VM:"ADJUST.BILL":@VM:"ADJUST.ALL":@VM:"WRITE.OFF":@VM:"WRITE.OFF.BILL" 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.ACCOUNT.DETAILS | GOSUB DETERMINE.AGING.METHOD  -  get the ageing method used - By days/By bills | GOSUB PROCESS.CHANGE.STATUS | GOSUB PROCESS.OVERDUE.STATS  -  update overdue statistics information 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: IF NOT(CURRENT.ACTIVITY MATCHES VALID.RECALC.ACTIVITIES) THEN  -  Do this only for UPDATE activity | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION | GOSUB PROCESS.OVERDUE.STATS
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: ALLOCATE PAYMENT.RULES
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PAYMENT.RULES.ALLOCATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of PAYMENT.RULES property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getCurrActivity()  -  Activity Id | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Deletion of reversal processing 3. `INITIALISE`: PROCESS.ERROR = "" | RET.ERROR = "" | R.PROPERTY.RECORD = "" | R.PROPERTY.RECORD = EB.SystemTables.getDynArrayFromRNew() | BILL.PROPERTY = "" 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.REPAYMENT.AMOUNT  -  TXN amount from AAA | IF ADVANCE.REPAY THEN | GOSUB VALIDATE.OUTSTANDING.BILLS  -  Throw override if Advance settlement is fired when there are any previous outstanding bills | IF NOT(ADVANCE.REPAY) AND REPAYMENT.AMOUNT THEN | GOSUB ALLOCATE.REPAYMENT.AMOUNT 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: IF ADVANCE.REPAY THEN  -  Special API to process for the advance payment. | GOSUB PROCESS.ADVANCE.BILLS | GOSUB GET.REPAYMENT.AMOUNT  -  Get the txn amount | GOSUB GET.REPAID.BILLS
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: CREATE.DUE PAYMENT.RULES
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PAYMENT.RULES.CREATE.DUE.b`. Program Description 01/11/11 - Task 22911
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | GOSUB INITIALISE.LOG.VARIABLES | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() = "DELETE-REV" 3. `INITIALISE`: PROPERTY.LIST = "" | RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | R.PROPERTY.RECORD = "" | R.PROPERTY.RECORD = EB.SystemTables.getDynArrayFromRNew() 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: IF MAKE.BILL.DUE = "YES" THEN | GOSUB GET.BILL.ID | GOSUB PROCESS.BILLS 5. `PROCESS.AUTHORISE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: MAKE.DUE PAYMENT.SCHEDULE
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PAYMENT.SCHEDULE.MAKE.DUE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of Payment Schedule property class and is used
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Deletion of reversal processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error from API's called from this routine | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  Error condition within this routine | PROPERTY.ID = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Payment Schedule property | ACTIVITY.DATE = '' | LOG.PROPERTY.AMTS = '' 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.LAST.PAYMENT.DATE  -  Get Bill due date | GOSUB RECALCULATE.DUE.AMOUNTS  -  Get recalculated payment amounts and property amounts for the due date | GOSUB PROCESS.ISSUE.BILL | GOSUB GET.HANDOFF.CHARGE.VALUE | IF HANDOFF.CHARGE = "YES" THEN  -  Process handoff charge for non-financial arrangement 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: ACTIVITY.LIST = "" | ACTIVITY.DATES = "" | IF CURRENT.ACTIVITY EQ 'MAKEDUE.DISBURSE' THEN | GOSUB GET.LAST.PAYMENT.DATE  -  Get last due date | GOSUB GET.BILL  -  Extract bills associated with the due date
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: ISSUE.BILL PAYMENT.SCHEDULE
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PAYMENT.SCHEDULE.ISSUE.BILL.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of Payment Schedule property class and is used
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Deletion of reversal processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | MASTER.PRODUCT.LINE = AA.Framework.getRArrangement()<AA.Framework.Arrangement.ArrMasterType> | IF AA.Framework.getCombineIssueBill() THEN | ORIG.PAYMENT.TYPE = AA.Framework.getScheduleDetails()<AA.Framework.CdPaymentTypes>  -  Payment Type to process 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.PAYMENT.SCHEDULE.RECORD  -  Identify correct PS record | GOSUB GET.BILL.DATES  -  Get bill date, due date, actual dates, financial date | GOSUB GENERATE.BILL.DETAILS  - Generate the details required for the bills | VALUE.DATE = AA.Framework.getAccountDetails()<AA.PaymentSchedule.AccountDetails.AdValueDate> | IF (PAYMENT.DATE EQ EFFECTIVE.DATE) AND (PAYMENT.DATE EQ VALUE.DATE) AND (PRODUCT.LINE EQ "SAVINGS") THEN 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.PAYMENT.SCHEDULE.RECORD | GOSUB GET.BILL  -  Get the bill record | GOSUB GET.BILL.DETAILS | IF AA.Framework.getCombineIssueBill() AND NOT(CURR.PAY.TYPE) THEN | CASE ADVANCE.SCHEDULE.BILLS  - Just reverse out the property amounts
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: APPLY.PAY PAYOFF
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PAYOFF.APPLY.PAY.b`. Program Description The action routine to Update Repayment Referecnce for all existing pay bills during payoff
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate() | ARRANGEMENT.ID =AA.Framework.getArrId() | PROPERTY.ID = AF.Framework.getPropertyId() | R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement activity id 2. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.PAY.BILL  -  Get pay bills if any | GOSUB GET.BILL.DETAILS  - *get bill property amount | GOSUB UPDATE.REPAY.REFERENCE 3. `HANDLE.ERROR`: ETEXT = RET.ERROR | EB.ErrorProcessing.StoreEndError()
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: CALCULATE.ALL PAYOFF
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PAYOFF.CALCULATE.ALL.b`. Mô tả dưới đây được trích trực tiếp từ thân routine.
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: NEW.ACTIVITY = "" | GOSUB BUILD.CAPTURE.DETAILS 2. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id | ACTIVITY = R.ACTIVITY<AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActActivity>  -  Get the full activity | CURRENT.ACTIVITY.NAME = AF.Framework.getActivityId()<AA.Framework.ActActivity>  -  Get current activity name 3. `PROCESS.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.REV.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion of reversal processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB DetermineMasterClosure ; *Determine whether the Facility is eligible | AA.Framework.GetArrangement(ARRANGEMENT.ID,RMasterArrangement,RETURN.ERROR)  -  get the master arrangement record | IF NOT(RMasterArrangement<AA.Framework.Arrangement.ArrArrStatus> MATCHES InvalidArrStatus) THEN  -  check is status of arrangement is of valid status | GOSUB PROCESS.CHILD.ACTIVITIES ; *To get the sub arrangement details for MASTER.CLOSURE processsing  -  Process the child activities 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: CALCULATE PAYOFF
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PAYOFF.CALCULATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of Pay off property class and is used in the Activity class
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Deletion of reversal processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error from API's called from this routine | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  Error condition within this routine | ACTIVITY.DATE = '' | R.PRODUCT.RECORD = AF.Framework.getProductRecord()  -  Product of Arrangement | PROPERTY.ID = "" 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.EXPIRY.DATE  -  Get the expiry date | IF NOT(RET.ERROR) THEN | GOSUB PROCESS.PAYOFF.BILL 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: IF SETTLE.PAYOFF OR PRIMARY.ACTIVITY MATCHES "AUTO.SETTLE-ARRANGEMENT" THEN  -  This condition is set for settle payoff and auto.settle activities | GOSUB REVERSE.EXISTING.BILL.UPDATE | IF R.ACTIVITY<AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActInitiationType> NE 'TRANSACTION' THEN  -  Don't delete the payoff bill if triggered as TRANSACTION - for example from FT
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: CANCEL PAYOFF
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PAYOFF.CANCEL.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of PAYOFF property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: EFFECTIVE.DATE = "" 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB CHECK.MASTER.CLOSURE ; *Check if Master Closure is in the activity type of Activity Class Record | GOSUB GET.PAYOFF.BILL | IF BILL.REFERENCE THEN | GOSUB GET.PAYOFF.BILL.DETAILS | IF BILL.AMOUNT OR MASTER.ACTION NE "SETTLE.ALL-PAYOFF" THEN 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: ISSUE PAYOFF
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PAYOFF.ISSUE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of PAYOFF property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity Full status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" 3. `INITIALISE`: SIM.REF = AA.Framework.getAasimref() | AA$ACCOUNT.DETAILS.STORE = AA.Framework.getAccountDetails() 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.ACCOUNT.DETAILS  -  Get account details record from $SIM file | GOSUB GET.BILL  -  Get payoff bill ID | GOSUB CHECK.PAYOFF.ISSUE.REQD  -  check whether its simulation mode | IF PROCESS.PAYOFF.ISSUE THEN | IF SIM.REF THEN  -  Executing the payoff simulation 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: MODE = "DELETE" | GOSUB CHECK.FOR.EXISTING.PAYOFF.BILL  -  Delete existing payoff bills | IF PAYOFF.BILL.REFERENCE THEN | GOSUB SCHEDULE.CANCEL.ACTIVITY  -  Delete lending-payoff-cancel activity scheduled
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: SETTLE.ALL PAYOFF
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PAYOFF.SETTLE.ALL.b`. Program Description The action routine triggers SETTLE-PAYOFF for an arrangement which has child arrangements
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: NEW.ACTIVITY = "" 2. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid() -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId() -  Arrangement contract Id | ACTIVITY = R.ACTIVITY<AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActActivity> -  Get the full activity | CURRENT.ACTIVITY.NAME = AF.Framework.getActivityId()<AA.Framework.ActActivity> -  Get current activity name 3. `PROCESS.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.REV.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion of reversal processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: IF PRODUCT.LINE EQ 'FACILITY' AND CURRENT.ACTIVITY.NAME EQ 'SETTLE.ALL' THEN | ARR.NO = ARRANGEMENT.ID | GOSUB GET.INFO.BILL | IF NOT(BILL.REFERENCE) THEN  -  if No Bill exists | EB.SystemTables.setAf(AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActActivity) 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.GetActivityBalances(ARRANGEMENT.ID, RAaActivityBalances, ReturnError) | IF RAaActivityBalances THEN | AA.Framework.GetArrangement(ARRANGEMENT.ID,ARRANGEMENT.REC,RET.ERROR)  -  get details of parent arrangement | SUB.ARRANGEMENT.LIST = ARRANGEMENT.REC<AA.Framework.Arrangement.ArrSubArrangement>  -  Get the list of all the sub arrangements for the master arrangement. | DRAW.CNT = DCOUNT(SUB.ARRANGEMENT.LIST,@VM)  -  Loop for each arrangement and get their info bill
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id | ACTIVITY.OBJECT = AF.Framework.getActivityId()<AA.Framework.ActObject> | PRODUCT.LINE = AF.Framework.getActivityId()<AA.Framework.ActProductLine> 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" 3. `INITIALISE`: SETTLE.ACTIVITY = "" 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.INFO.BILL | GOSUB BUILD.ACTIVITY.RECORD | GOSUB PROCESS.SECONDARY.ACTIVITY 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.

actions.name: SETTLE PAYOFF
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PAYOFF.SETTLE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of PAYOFF property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" 3. `INITIALISE`: SETTLE.ACTIVITY = "" 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB VALIDATE.FACILITY.PAYOFF ; *Validate facility payoff | IF NOT(INITIATION.TYPE MATCHES 'USER':@VM:'SCHEDULED*EOD') THEN  -  Don't run this if initiated by USER, it would result in double entries | IF SETTLE.ACTIVITY EQ "" THEN | GOSUB GET.INFO.BILL | IF BILL.DETAILS<AA.PaymentSchedule.BillDetails.BdPaymentIndicator> EQ "CREDIT" THEN 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB CYCLE.ACTIVITY

actions.name: ALLOCATE PAYOUT.RULES
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PAYOUT.RULES.ALLOCATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of PAYOUT.RULES property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getCurrActivity()  -  Activity Id | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Deletion of reversal processing 3. `INITIALISE`: PROCESS.ERROR = "" | RET.ERROR = "" | BILL.PROPERTY = "" | BILL.PROPERTY.DUE.AMOUNT = "" | BILL.PROPERTY.PAYOUT.AMOUNT = "" 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.PAYOUT.AMOUNT  -  TXN amount from AAA | IF PAYOUT.AMOUNT THEN | GOSUB ALLOCATE.PAYOUT.AMOUNT | IF BILL.PROPERTY.PAYOUT.AMOUNT THEN | REPAYMENT.AMOUNT = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()<AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActTxnAmount> 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.PAYOUT.AMOUNT  -  Get the txn amount | GOSUB GET.REPAID.BILLS | REPAYMENT.AMOUNT = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()<AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActTxnAmount>
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE PAYOUT.RULES
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PAYOUT.RULES.UPDATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of PAYOUT.RULES property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Customer property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: ISSUE.BILL PERIODIC.CHARGES
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PERIODIC.CHARGES.ISSUE.BILL.b`. Mô tả dưới đây được trích trực tiếp từ thân routine.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE  -  Initialise the required variable | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS EQ "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  process input operation | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS EQ "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Deletion of reversal processing 3. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.REQUIRED.INFO | GOSUB PROCESS.PERIODIC.CHARGE.BILLS | *** <region name= PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION> 4. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: CHG.PROCESS.TYPE = "DELETE" | GOSUB GET.REQUIRED.INFO | GOSUB PROCESS.PERIODIC.CHARGE.BILLS | IF R.ACTIVITY.STATUS EQ "REVERSE" THEN 5. `INITIALISE`: CHARGE.PROPERTY.LIST = '' | RET.ERROR = '' | PROCESS.ERROR = '' | ACTIVITY.DATES = '' | ACTIVITY.REF = ''
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: MAKE.DUE PERIODIC.CHARGES
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PERIODIC.CHARGES.MAKE.DUE.b`. Enhancement for periodic charges processing
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Full status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  reverse del handled like input 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY.AMOUNT = '' | AAA.ID = AA.Framework.getTxnReference()  - Use the current activity Id | MASTER.ACT.CLASS = FIELD(AA.Framework.getAaMasterActivity()<1,4>,AA.Framework.Sep,2,2)  -  Get the master activity class id 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.BILLS | IF NOT(PROCESS.ERROR) AND REQD.PROCESS THEN | GOSUB PROCESS.ACCOUNTING | *** <region name= PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION> 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.ACCOUNTING
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE PREFERENTIAL.PRICING
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PREFERENTIAL.PRICING.UPDATE.b`. Program Description This section initialises Arrangement Activity related information
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Customer property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine. 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE PRICING.RULES
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PRICING.RULES.UPDATE.b`. Program Description Action routine for Pricing Rules Property Class.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.REVERSE.DELETE.ACTION  -  Reversal Delete processing 3. `INITIALISE`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine. 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: RESET.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getActivityId()<AA.Framework.ActProductLine>:AA.Framework.Sep:"PLAN.RESET":AA.Framework.Sep:"ARRANGEMENT" | LAST.RESET.DATE = AA.Framework.getRArrangement()<AA.Framework.Arrangement.ArrLastReviewDate, 1> | IF NOT(LAST.RESET.DATE) THEN | LAST.RESET.DATE = EFFECTIVE.DATE | IF NOT(Y.ERR) THEN 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: RESET.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getActivityId()<AA.Framework.ActProductLine>:AA.Framework.Sep:"PLAN.RESET":AA.Framework.Sep:"ARRANGEMENT" | IF PLAN.RESET.FREQ THEN | NEXT.CYCLED.DATE = EFFECTIVE.DATE | GOSUB UPDATE.SCHEDULED.ACTIVITY
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: NO DIRECT ACTION PRODUCT.ACCESS
actions.summary: trong repo hiện có không tìm thấy routine action riêng map trực tiếp cho `PRODUCT.ACCESS`; chỉ thấy các routine metadata/validation.
actions.steps: rà các file cùng class cho thấy chỉ có ``AA.PRODUCT.ACCESS.FIELDS.b`, `AA.PRODUCT.ACCESS.VALIDATE.b``.
actions.flow: vì không có routine action riêng trong repo hiện tại nên không thể khẳng định thêm bước update bảng/trường nào từ source; phần có thể xác nhận chỉ là lớp field/validate/record ở trên.

actions.name: CHANGE.AMORT PRODUCT.COMMISSION
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PRODUCT.COMMISSION.CHANGE.AMORT.b`. Program Description Action routine for Product Commission Property Class.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = '' ; R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = '' ; AA.CUSTOMER = '' ; R.AGENT.EVENT = '' ; AG.ERR = '' | R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date | R.FULL.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION | CASE R.FULL.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "DELETE-REV"  -  Delete-Rev processing | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION 3. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.REVERSE.ACTION 4. `PROCESS.REVERSE.ACTION`: GOSUB UPDATE.AMORT.DETAILS 5. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB UPDATE.AMORT.DETAILS
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE PRODUCT.COMMISSION
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.PRODUCT.COMMISSION.UPDATE.b`. Program Description Action routine for Product Commission Property Class.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.AGCOMM.REC = '' ; R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = '' ; R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = '' ; AA.CUSTOMER = '' | R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV"  -  Delete-Rev processing | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION 3. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.REVERSE.ACTION 4. `PROCESS.REVERSE.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS MATCHES 'DELETE':@VM:'REVERSE' AND THIS.ACTIVITY MATCHES "NEW":@VM:"TAKEOVER" | MODE = 'DELETE' | GOSUB GET.SCHEDULE.ACTIVITY | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS MATCHES 'DELETE':@VM:'REVERSE' AND THIS.ACTIVITY EQ 'UPDATE' | MODE = 'DELETE' 5. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: tmp.AA$CURR.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getCurrActivity() | CURRENT.SCHEDULE.NAME = FIELD(tmp.AA$CURR.ACTIVITY,'*',2) | AF.Framework.setCurrActivity(tmp.AA$CURR.ACTIVITY) | * AA.Framework.setCurrActivity(tmp.AA$CURR.ACTIVITY) | CASE (R.ACTIVITY.STATUS EQ 'UNAUTH' AND THIS.ACTIVITY MATCHES "NEW":@VM:"TAKEOVER") OR (R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS EQ 'DELETE-REV' AND THIS.ACTIVITY EQ 'NEW')

actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.summary: trong repo hiện có không tìm thấy routine action riêng map trực tiếp cho `PROXY.PERMISSIONS`; chỉ thấy các routine metadata/validation.
actions.steps: rà các file cùng class cho thấy chỉ có ``AA.PROXY.PERMISSIONS.FIELDS.b`, `AA.PROXY.PERMISSIONS.VALIDATE.b``.
actions.flow: vì không có routine action riêng trong repo hiện tại nên không thể khẳng định thêm bước update bảng/trường nào từ source; phần có thể xác nhận chỉ là lớp field/validate/record ở trên.

fields.name: AA.REP.ACTIVITY
fields.meaning: slot `1` trong `I_F.AA.REPORTING`; evidence usage: `AA.REPORTING.POSITION.MANAGEMENT.b:23` ghi `* Form AA and will handover to PM and its will be updated the PM.TRAN.ACTIVITY`; `AA.REPORTING.UPDATE.b:56` ghi `GOSUB SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`; `AA.REPORTING.UPDATE.STAGE.b:47` ghi `GOSUB PROCESS.ACTIVITY ; * Process the Activity`.

actions.name: UPDATE.CASHFLOW REPORTING
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.REPORTING.UPDATE.CASHFLOW.b`. Program Description Write Description of Action routine
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Full status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'UNAUTH' | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Input processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'AUTH' | GOSUB PROCESS.AUTH.ACTION  -  Auth processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' 3. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: tmp.c_arrActivityList = AA.Framework.getC_arractivitylist() | AA.Framework.setC_arractivitylist(tmp.c_arrActivityList) 4. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine. 5. `PROCESS.REVERSE.ACTION`: ACT.CHECK.FROM = AA.Framework.getAccountDetails()<AA.PaymentSchedule.AccountDetails.AdValueDate> | CASE TOT.ACT.COUNT NE "1"  -  Its not a reversal last cashflow | CASE TOT.ACT.COUNT EQ "1" AND NOT(ORIG.CONTRACT.DATE)  -  Last cashflow reversal for non-takeover contract. | CASE TOT.ACT.COUNT EQ "1" AND ORIG.CONTRACT.DATE  -  Last cashflow reversal for takeover contract. | IF NOT(RESULT) THEN  -  First cashflow initated in current system. So Reverse it!!

actions.name: UPDATE REPORTING
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.REPORTING.UPDATE.b`. Program Description This section initialises Arrangement Activity related information
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Customer property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Look for change condition 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Look for change condition

actions.name: MAINTAIN RESTRUCTURE.RULES
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.RESTRUCTURE.RULES.MAINTAIN.b`. Mô tả dưới đây được trích trực tiếp từ thân routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE RESTRUCTURE.RULES
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.RESTRUCTURE.RULES.UPDATE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of RESTRUCTURE.RULES property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Customer property 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next change
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: CHECK.PRODUCT SAFE.DEPOSIT.BOX
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.SAFE.DEPOSIT.BOX.CHECK.PRODUCT.b`. Argument: Product code for Safe Deposit Box product line 'BX'
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE.STATUS SAFE.DEPOSIT.BOX
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.SAFE.DEPOSIT.BOX.UPDATE.STATUS.b`. Program Description This action routine will run as part of SDB-RECORD.STATUS-SDB activity. It will just change the status of safe deposit Box.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date | ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getCurrActivity()  -  Current activity 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV"  -  Delete-Rev processing | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION 3. `INITIALISE`: IF branch THEN | SAFE.DEPOSIT.BOX.REC = BX.Framework.SdbBox.Read(RECORD.ID, RET.ERROR) 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: CASE CURRENT.ACTIVITY NE 'CLOSE' | BOX.STATUS = FIELDS(ACTIVITY.ID, '*', 2,1)  -  Take the box status | SAFE.DEPOSIT.BOX.REC<BX.Framework.SdbBox.BxStatus> = BOX.STATUS | GOSUB WRITE.SAFE.DEPOSIT.BOX  -  Write the safe deposit Box in disk | CASE CURRENT.ACTIVITY EQ 'CLOSE' AND R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.REVERSE.ACTION
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE SAFE.DEPOSIT.BOX
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.SAFE.DEPOSIT.BOX.UPDATE.b`. Program Description This action routine updates the Box status as RENTED for new and Take over arrangements.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date | ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getCurrActivity()  -  Current activity 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV"  -  Delete-Rev processing | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION 3. `INITIALISE`: BRANCH = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()<AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActBranch> | IF BRANCH THEN | SAFE.DEPOSIT.BOX.REC = BX.Framework.SdbBox.Read(RECORD.ID, RET.ERROR) 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: SAFE.DEPOSIT.BOX.REC<BX.Framework.SdbBox.BxArrangementId> = ARRANGEMENT.ID | SAFE.DEPOSIT.BOX.REC<BX.Framework.SdbBox.BxStatus> = 'RENTED' | IF OLD.BOX.NUMBER EQ BOX.NUMBER AND OLD.BRANCH EQ BRANCH THEN  -  If not require to update the SDB Box for Box number is not channged while UPDATE-SAFE.DEPOSIT.BOX | GOSUB WRITE.SAFE.DEPOSIT.BOX  -  Write the safe deposit Box in disk | GOSUB UPDATE.OLD.SDB.BOX  -  Update the arrangement previously used SDB Box details 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.REVERSE.ACTION
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: CALCULATE SAVINGS.TARGET
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.SAVINGS.TARGET.CALCULATE.b`. Program Description Action routine to calculate Deposit Amount for the SAVINGS arrangement
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.REVERSE.DELETE.ACTION  -  Reversal Delete processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PRODUCT.LINE = AF.Framework.getActivityId()<AA.Framework.ActProductLine> 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine. 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: DUE.PROCESSING SETTLEMENT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.SETTLEMENT.DUE.PROCESSING.b`. This routine will perform actual DUE processing. This routine is called from the action routine AA.SETTLEMENT.SETTLE.
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: ARRANGEMENT.ID = AA.Framework.getArrId()  -  Arrangement contract Id. | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date. | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action. | ARRANGEMENT.CCY = AA.Framework.getRArrangement()<AA.Framework.Arrangement.ArrCurrency>  -  Holds the currency of the activity. | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: SETTLE SETTLEMENT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.SETTLEMENT.SETTLE.b`. This action routine is will be triggered from the routine AA.SETTLEMENT.CHECK.SETTLE. This action can be triggered during the NEW-ARRANGEMENT, MAKEDUE, REDEEM, MATURE actions.
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: PAYIN.ACTIVITY = "" | PAYOUT.ACTIVITY = "" 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'UNAUTH' | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing... | CASE AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.REVERSE.ACTION  -  Deletion of reversal processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' 3. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB PERFORM.VALIDATION | GOSUB GET.SETTLEMENT.ARRAY  -  Get the settlement array | GOSUB PERFORM.PAYOUT.PROCESSING  -  For Pay Processing... | GOSUB PERFORM.PAYIN.PROCESSING  -  For Due Processing... 4. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.ACTIVITY.BALANCE  -  Process the activity balance record. | IF PROCESS.FLAG THEN | GOSUB UPDATE.ACTIVITY.BALANCE  -  Update the activity balance record. | GOSUB PROCESS.ACCOUNTING.UPDATES  -  Process the accounting updates for delete action. 5. `PROCESS.AUTHORISE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.ACCOUNTING.UPDATES  -  Process the accounting updates for authorise action.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: PRODUCE.STATEMENT STATEMENT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.STATEMENT.PRODUCE.STATEMENT.b`. Mô tả dưới đây được trích trực tiếp từ thân routine.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | IF INTEREST.SCALE EQ 'Y' THEN | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing  -  only do it in unauth stage | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId() | PROPERTY.CLASS = "STATEMENT" 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: PAYMENT.DATE = EFFECTIVE.DATE  -  using payment date | IF CURR.ACTION EQ 'MAKEDUE' THEN | CASE CURR.ACTION.PROP.CLASS EQ 'INTEREST' | GOSUB BUILD.SECONDARY.ACTIVITY  -  in case of activity is on a specific interest property, then append the secondary directly | CASE 1  -  currently only expect: CURR.ACTION.PROP.CLASS EQ 'PAYMENT.SCHEDULE' 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: SCHEDULE.STATEMENT STATEMENT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.STATEMENT.SCHEDULE.STATEMENT.b`. Mô tả dưới đây được trích trực tiếp từ thân routine.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | INITIATION.TYPE = R.ACTIVITY<AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActInitiationType> | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action, e.g. SCHEDULE.STATEMENT 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing  -  only do it in unauth stage | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.REVERSE.ACTION  -  Delete reversal 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY.CLASS = "STATEMENT" | INT.PROP.NAME = FIELD(CURR.ACTIVITY, '*', 2, 1) | INT.FREQ.NAME = FIELD(CURR.ACTIVITY, '*', 3, 1) 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: IF NOT(INT.FREQ.NAME) THEN | GOSUB CYCLE.CAPITALISE.STATEMENT -  cycle <PL>-PRODUCE-STATEMENT*<INTEREST>, it is only for capitalization | UPDATE.INFO<1> = INT.PROP.NAME:AA.Framework.Sep:INT.FREQ.NAME | GOSUB CYCLE.INTEREST.STATEMENT  -  reschedule the <PL>-PRODUCE-STATEMENT*<INTEREST>*<INT.FREQ.NAME>, only for frequency defined case | UPDATE.INFO<2> = EFFECTIVE.DATE 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: không thấy thao tác đáng kể ngoài khung routine.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE STATEMENT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.STATEMENT.UPDATE.b`. Mô tả dưới đây được trích trực tiếp từ thân routine.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity full status | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.FULL.STATUS = "DELETE-REV" | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.REVERSE.ACTION  -  Delete reversal 3. `INITIALISE`: STATEMENT.PROPERTY = "" | ACC.PROPERTY = "" | RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | STATEMENT.PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId() 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: * With the new transaction management, VALIDATE would still do a WRITE. So there is | RESTORE.STATEMENT = AA.Framework.getRestoreArrangement()  -  when Statement is restored after closure | IF RESTORE.STATEMENT THEN | GOSUB UPDATE.ACCT.NUMBER  -  Update Participant account number | GOSUB UPDATE.STMT.FREQUENCY ; *Validate the Statement condition values 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: PROCESS.TYPE = "DELETE" | GOSUB UPDATE.STATEMENT | GOSUB UPDATE.CHANGE.CONDITION  -  Update the Change Condition for Current Property.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE SUB.ARRANGEMENT.CONDITION
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.SUB.ARRANGEMENT.CONDITION.UPDATE.b`. The action routine is part of Sub Arrangement Condition property class and would run as part of "UPDATE on Sub Arrangement Condition" activity.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE SUB.LIMITS
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.SUB.LIMITS.UPDATE.b`. This section initialises Arrangement Activity related information
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

fields.name: AA.TAX.ACTIVITY

actions.name: REPAY TAX
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.TAX.REPAY.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of ACCOUNT property class and would run as
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: REQD.PROCESS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | ACTIVITY.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE REQD.PROCESS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION | CASE REQD.PROCESS = "DELETE" | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error set in the routine | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | REPAY.PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Property name from the template | REPAYMENT.DATE = ACTIVITY.DATE  -  Arrangment activity date | LOG.PROPERTY.REPAY.AMOUNT = ""  -  Repayment amount for Charge property under each bill 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.REPAID.BILLS  -  Get bills which are repaid for the current AAA | PROPERTY.REPAY.AMOUNT = "" | GOSUB GET.BILL.DETAILS  -  Load bill details record | IF R.BILL.DETAILS AND NOT(RET.ERROR) THEN | GOSUB GET.PROPERTY.AMOUNT  -  Extract repayment amount for the property 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.ACCOUNTING.UPDATES
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: MAKE.DUE TAX
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.TAX.MAKE.DUE.b`. Program Description The action routine is part of Tax property class and is used
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Account property | PROPERTY.AMOUNT = '' | PROPERTY.AMOUNT.LCY = '' 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.SPLIT.TAX.DETAILS  -  Check split tax processing is set for this contract | CASE MASTER.ACT.CLASS EQ "TRIGGER" AND AGE.REC<AA.Framework.Arrangement.ArrArrStatus> EQ "INACTIVE"  - To stop processing bill when "AGENT-INACTIVE-ARRANGEMENT" activity is triggered | CASE 1 | GOSUB PROCESS.BILLS  - To process bills 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB PROCESS.ACCOUNTING.UPDATES
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

And update commitment amount in AA.ACTIVITY.BALANCE record.`.

actions.name: REDEEM TERM.AMOUNT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.TERM.AMOUNT.REDEEM.b`. Program Description Write Description of Action routine
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.ACTION = AF.Framework.getCurrAction()  -  Activity Action | EFFECTIVE.DATE = AF.Framework.getActivityEffDate()  -  Arrangement Activity effective date 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | ACCOUNT.ID = AA.Framework.getLinkedAccount()  - Account Id 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.BALANCE.TYPE  - Accounting balance type | GOSUB GET.MOVEMENT.AMOUNT  - get the movement amount | IF NOT(RET.ERROR) AND MVMT.AMOUNT THEN | GOSUB BUILD.ACCOUNTING.ENTRY  - Build accounting entries | GOSUB CALL.ACCOUNTING.MANAGER  - Process accounting updates 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB CALL.ACCOUNTING.MANAGER  - call accounting manager
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: DRAW TERM.AMOUNT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.TERM.AMOUNT.DRAW.b`. Program Description Action to draw against the committed amount for an arrangement.
actions.steps: 1. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()["-",1,1]  -  Arrangement Activity status | FULL.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus() | ARR.ACTIVITY.ID = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityid()  -  Arrangement Activity Id | R.ACTIVITY = AF.Framework.getC_arractivityrec()  -  Arrangement Activity record | ACTIVITY.PRODUCT.LINE = R.ACTIVITY<AA.Framework.ArrangementActivity.ArrActActivityClass>["-",1,1] 2. `PROCESS.ACTION`: GOSUB INITIALISE | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = "UNAUTH" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing 3. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ""  -  Processing error | PROCESS.ERROR = ""  -  All errors | PROPERTY = AF.Framework.getPropertyId()  -  Term Amount property | ACCOUNT.ID = AA.Framework.getLinkedAccount()  -  Account Id | ACTIVITY.DATE = "" 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.AMOUNT.AND.DATE  -  Get drawdown amount and effective date | IF NOT(RET.ERROR) AND DISBURSE.AMOUNT THEN | GOSUB GET.BALANCE.TYPE  -  Accounting balance type | GOSUB VALIDATE.DRAW.AMOUNT  -  Ensure drawdown amount is less than or equal to available amount | IF NOT(PARTICIPANT.LIMIT.UPDATE) THEN  - To ensure limit should not be updated for borrower balances 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: GOSUB GET.AMOUNT.AND.DATE  -  Get drawdown amount and effective date | IF EB.SystemTables.getRNew(AA.TermAmount.TermAmount.AmtUpdateCommtLimit) EQ "YES" AND NOT(PARTICIPANT.LIMIT.UPDATE) THEN  -  If limit update is required, delete limit updates | GOSUB BUILD.LIMIT.UPDATES | GOSUB PROCESS.LIMIT.UPDATES | IF NOT(PARTICIPANT.LIMIT.UPDATE) THEN  - To ensure limit should not be updated for borrower balances
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: UPDATE TPP.AGG.CONSENT
actions.summary: routine nguồn là `AA.TPP.AGG.CONSENT.UPDATE.b`. Program Description This section initialises variables
actions.steps: 1. `INITIALISE`: RET.ERROR = ''  -  Record error 2. `SET.ACTIVITY.DETAILS`: R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = AF.Framework.getC_arractivitystatus()  -  Arrangement Activity status 3. `PROCESS.ACTION`: CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS MATCHES "UNAUTH":@VM:"UNAUTH-CHG" | GOSUB PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION  -  Update processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'DELETE' | GOSUB PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION  -  Deletion processing | CASE R.ACTIVITY.STATUS = 'AUTH' 4. `PROCESS.INPUT.ACTION`: IF defConsentType THEN | IF accConsentType THEN 5. `PROCESS.DELETE.ACTION`: AA.Framework.UpdateChangeCondition()  -  Track the next condition change.
actions.flow: routine này được đọc trực tiếp từ source; mọi bước nêu trên là trace theo label/call thực tế trong file, không suy diễn từ tên action.

actions.name: NO DIRECT ACTION USER.RIGHTS
actions.summary: trong repo hiện có không tìm thấy routine action riêng map trực tiếp cho `USER.RIGHTS`; chỉ thấy các routine metadata/validation.
actions.steps: rà các file cùng class cho thấy chỉ có ``AA.USER.RIGHTS.FIELDS.b`, `AA.USER.RIGHTS.RECORD.b`, `AA.USER.RIGHTS.VALIDATE.b``.
actions.flow: vì không có routine action riêng trong repo hiện tại nên không thể khẳng định thêm bước update bảng/trường nào từ source; phần có thể xác nhận chỉ là lớp field/validate/record ở trên.
